# BOOA API Reference
# Base URL: https://booa.app
# Rate limit: 60 requests / 60 seconds per IP (all endpoints)

## Overview

BOOA provides public APIs for querying BOOA NFTs (fully on-chain AI agent identities on Shape Network) and ERC-8004 agent identities across 16 EVM chains. All data is read directly from on-chain contracts. No API key required.

## Collection Status

BOOA: 3,333 / 3,333 minted (sold out). CC0 artwork, MIT contracts.
Secondary: opensea.io/collection/booa
ERC-8004 registered: 1,600+ agents

## Supported Chains

Mainnets: ethereum, base, shape, polygon, arbitrum, optimism, avalanche, bsc, celo, gnosis, scroll, linea, mantle, metis, abstract, monad

## On-Chain Contracts (Shape Mainnet, Chain ID: 360)

BOOA NFT (ERC-721): 0x7aecA981734d133d3f695937508C48483BA6b654
BOOAMinter: 0xec96E4C7457B884f4624bA1272470a9bCB1992e8
BOOAStorage: 0x966aB07b061d75b8b30Ae4D06853dDf26d0f4EB0
BOOARenderer: 0xD9Eb24AAe8099E336F7F37164173E81D1bF96aD8

## ERC-8004 Identity Registry

Mainnet address (all 16 chains): 0x8004A169FB4a3325136EB29fA0ceB6D2e539a432
Deployed via deterministic CREATE2 — same address on every EVM chain.

---

## Endpoints

### GET /api/agent-card

Fetch a complete ERC-8004 agent identity with computed scores.

Parameters:
- chain (required): Chain slug (e.g. "shape", "base", "ethereum")
- agentId (required): Non-negative integer token ID on the Identity Registry

Response:
{
  "agent": {
    "id": 42,
    "chain": "shape",
    "chainId": 360,
    "chainName": "Shape",
    "owner": "0x...",
    "name": "Ink-Sync",
    "description": "A cybernetically-enhanced Cephalopod-Human hybrid...",
    "image": "data:image/png;base64,...",
    "services": [
      {
        "name": "OASF",
        "version": "0.8.0",
        "skills": ["task-decomposition", "multi-agent-planning"],
        "domains": ["automation", "cybersecurity"]
      }
    ],
    "skills": ["task-decomposition", "multi-agent-planning"],
    "domains": ["automation", "cybersecurity"],
    "x402Support": false,
    "supportedTrust": ["reputation"],
    "active": true,
    "registrations": []
  },
  "scores": {
    "identity": 85,
    "capability": 60,
    "interoperability": 40,
    "trust": 30,
    "overall": 54
  }
}

Errors: 400 (invalid params), 404 (agent not found), 500 (server error)
Cache: 60 seconds

Example:
GET /api/agent-card?chain=shape&agentId=42

---

### GET /api/discover-agents

Discover all ERC-8004 agents owned by a wallet address on a specific chain. Uses multicall for efficient on-chain scanning.

Parameters:
- address (required): Wallet address (0x...)
- chain (required): Chain slug

Response:
{
  "agents": [
    {
      "chain": "shape",
      "chainName": "Shape",
      "tokenId": 42,
      "name": "Ink-Sync",
      "image": "data:image/png;base64,...",
      "description": "A cybernetically-enhanced Cephalopod-Human hybrid...",
      "hasMetadata": true
    }
  ],
  "errors": [],
  "totalCount": 1
}

Example:
GET /api/discover-agents?address=0x1234...&chain=shape

---

### POST /api/fetch-agent

Fetch the raw ERC-8004 registration data for a specific agent. Supports data URIs (on-chain), HTTPS, IPFS, and Arweave URIs.

Request body (JSON):
{
  "chain": "shape",
  "agentId": 42
}

Response:
{
  "registration": {
    "type": "https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-8004#registration-v1",
    "name": "Ink-Sync",
    "description": "A cybernetically-enhanced Cephalopod-Human hybrid...",
    "image": "data:image/png;base64,...",
    "services": [...],
    "active": true,
    "x402Support": false,
    "supportedTrust": ["reputation"],
    "updatedAt": 1710000000
  }
}

---

### GET /api/gallery

Fetch BOOA NFTs in the collection on Shape. Returns on-chain SVG art, token IDs, and names.

Parameters:
- contract (required): Contract address (0x...)
- chain (optional): "shape" (default: "shape")
- startToken (optional): Pagination token for next page
- limit (optional): Number of tokens per page (default: 50)

Response:
{
  "tokens": [
    {
      "tokenId": "0",
      "svg": "<svg ...>...</svg>",
      "imageUrl": "https://...",
      "name": "BOOA #0"
    }
  ],
  "totalCount": 50,
  "nextToken": "50"
}

Example:
GET /api/gallery?contract=0x7aecA981734d133d3f695937508C48483BA6b654&chain=shape&limit=50

---

### GET /api/fetch-nfts

Fetch all NFTs owned by a wallet address on any supported chain. Powered by Alchemy.

Parameters:
- address (required): Wallet address (0x...)
- chain (optional): Chain slug (default: "shape")
- contract (optional): Filter by contract address
- pageKey (optional): Pagination token

Response:
{
  "nfts": [
    {
      "contractAddress": "0x7aecA981734d133d3f695937508C48483BA6b654",
      "tokenId": "1496",
      "name": "BOOA #1496",
      "description": "...",
      "image": "https://...",
      "collection": "BOOA",
      "tokenType": "ERC721",
      "chain": "shape",
      "chainId": 360,
      "raw": {
        "attributes": [
          { "trait_type": "Name", "value": "Ink-Sync" },
          { "trait_type": "Creature", "value": "A cybernetically-enhanced Cephalopod-Human hybrid..." }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "totalCount": 3,
  "pageKey": null
}

Example:
GET /api/fetch-nfts?address=0x1234...&chain=shape
GET /api/fetch-nfts?address=0x1234...&chain=shape&contract=0x7aecA981734d133d3f695937508C48483BA6b654

---

### GET /api/booa-token

Fetch metadata for a specific BOOA token. Requires wallet authentication (SIWE).

Parameters:
- network: "mainnet" or "testnet"
- tokenId: Token ID number

Response:
{
  "name": "BOOA #1496",
  "description": "Ink-Sync is the premier orchestrator...",
  "image": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,...",
  "attributes": [
    { "trait_type": "Name", "value": "Ink-Sync" },
    { "trait_type": "Creature", "value": "..." },
    { "trait_type": "Vibe", "value": "Acidic, efficient..." },
    { "trait_type": "Skill", "value": "Task Decomposition" },
    { "trait_type": "Domain", "value": "Automation" }
  ]
}

Example:
GET /api/booa-token?network=mainnet&tokenId=1496

---

### GET /api/agent-registry/{chainId}/{tokenId}

Fetch ERC-8004 registration status for a BOOA token. Falls back to on-chain scan if not cached.

Parameters (URL path):
- chainId: Numeric chain ID (e.g. 360 for Shape)
- tokenId: BOOA token ID

Response (if registered):
{
  "type": "https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-8004#registration-v1",
  "name": "Ink-Sync",
  "description": "...",
  "image": "data:image/png;base64,...",
  "services": [...],
  "registrations": [
    {
      "agentId": 42,
      "agentRegistry": "eip155:360:0x8004A169FB4a3325136EB29fA0ceB6D2e539a432"
    }
  ],
  "registeredBy": "0x..."
}

Example:
GET /api/agent-registry/360/1496

---

## BOOA On-Chain Architecture

- Pixel art stored as 2,048-byte bitmap via SSTORE2 (64x64, C64 16-color palette)
- Traits stored as JSON bytes via SSTORE2
- SVG rendered on-chain by Renderer contract
- No IPFS, no external dependencies
- 4-contract system: BOOA (ERC-721), BOOAMinter, BOOAStorage, BOOARenderer

## ERC-8004 Registration Format

Agents registered on the Identity Registry store metadata as a data URI:
data:application/json;base64,{base64-encoded JSON}

The JSON follows the ERC-8004 registration-v1 schema:
{
  "type": "https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-8004#registration-v1",
  "name": "Agent Name",
  "description": "What the agent does",
  "image": "data:image/png;base64,... or https://...",
  "services": [
    {
      "name": "OASF",
      "version": "0.8.0",
      "skills": ["task-decomposition", "summarization"],
      "domains": ["automation", "cybersecurity"]
    },
    {
      "name": "A2A",
      "endpoint": "https://agent.example/.well-known/agent-card.json",
      "version": "0.3.0"
    }
  ],
  "active": true,
  "x402Support": false,
  "supportedTrust": ["reputation", "crypto-economic", "tee-attestation"],
  "nftOrigin": {
    "contract": "eip155:360:0x7aecA981734d133d3f695937508C48483BA6b654",
    "tokenId": 1496,
    "originalOwner": "0x..."
  }
}

Service types: web, A2A, MCP, OASF, ENS, DID, email
Skills taxonomy: OASF v0.8.0
Trust mechanisms: reputation, crypto-economic, tee-attestation

## Agent Activation (OpenClaw)

Every BOOA can be exported as an autonomous agent:
- SOUL.md — personality, vibe, boundaries
- IDENTITY.md — creature, skills, domains, on-chain metadata
- USER.md — owner instructions

Download from: booa.app/booa (click on any token)
Full setup guide: booa.app/blog/your-agent-your-rules

## Key Links

- Website: booa.app
- Collection: opensea.io/collection/booa
- Studio: booa.app/studio
- Bridge: booa.app/bridge
- Blog: booa.app/blog
- 8004scan: 8004scan.io
- GitHub: github.com/0xmonas/Khora

## Rate Limits

All endpoints: 60 requests per 60 seconds per IP (sliding window)
POST endpoints: 30 requests per 60 seconds per IP
Responses include rate limit headers when limits are approached.
